| workbook_id | workbook_name | is_consultant | custom_sql_id | Custom SQL queries |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 7f0d75b3-a9b1-a75e-5fd7-bc6af9878911 | Sample 1 | TRUE | 2f962613-9d1d-04c0-94eb-7455b84c8f47 | WITH regional_sales AS (<br> SELECT region, SUM(amount) AS total_revenue<br> FROM orders GROUP BY region),<br>top_regions AS (<br> SELECT region FROM regional_sales<br> WHERE total_revenue > 10000)<br>SELECT <br> r.region, <br> r.total_revenue<br>FROM regional_sales r<br>JOIN top_regions t ON r.region = t.region; |
| 7f0d75b3-a9b1-a75e-5fd7-bc6af9878911 | Sample 1 | TRUE | 3e819bd5-7791-9169-5689-11216d8c6afa | WITH dept_avg AS (<br> SELECT dept_id, AVG(salary) AS avg_sal<br> FROM employees GROUP BY dept_id),<br>high_earners AS (<br> SELECT e.name, e.salary, d.avg_sal<br> FROM employees e JOIN dept_avg d ON e.dept_id = d.dept_id)<br>SELECT name, salary <br>FROM high_earners <br>WHERE salary > avg_sal <br>ORDER BY salary DESC; |
